LocaleLayout.title: Apartment System
LocaleLayout.description: Apartment management — admin console, Go API, MongoDB

NotFoundPage.title: Page not found
NotFoundPage.body: The link may be wrong or the page was removed.

HomePage.heading: Property management MVP
HomePage.intro: Open the admin console to manage properties, units, residents, leases, and maintenance. The UI talks to the Go API from the server using API_URL.

Portal.hint: Signed-in requests send a Bearer token from an httpOnly cookie; business rules are enforced in the Go API.

DashboardPage.title: Dashboard
DashboardPage.subtitle: At-a-glance counts from your portfolio. Connect the API and MongoDB to see live numbers.

PropertiesPage.title: Properties
PropertiesPage.subtitle: Buildings or sites you manage. Labels for units must be unique within each property.
PropertiesPage.listError: Could not load properties. Is the API running?

PropertyDetailPage.label: Unit label
PropertyDetailPage.selfService: Allow residents to book this unit online (when vacant and rent is set)
PropertyDetailPage.fetchErrorBody: The API returned an error. If you were signed out, sign in again.

UnitsPage.title: Units
UnitsPage.subtitle: Leasable spaces linked to a property. Create units from a property’s page.

ResidentsPage.title: Residents
ResidentsPage.subtitle: People records; email must be unique in this MVP.

LeasesPage.title: Leases
LeasesPage.subtitle: Contracts for a unit. Only one active lease per unit is allowed; activating sets the unit to occupied.
LeasesPage.addHint: Use resident ObjectIds from the list below, comma-separated for co-tenants.

MaintenancePage.title: Maintenance
MaintenancePage.subtitle: Unit-linked requests (MVP slice from the product feature list).

Auth.loginSubtitle: Staff and residents use the same login. Choose email and password or Google.
Auth.registerSubtitle: Use the email you share with the building. If it is already linked, sign in instead.
Auth.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Try again or use email and password.

MyPortal.title: Resident portal
MyPortal.homeUnknown: No primary unit on file yet. You can rent an available unit online, or ask the office to link your unit.
MyPortal.noActiveLease: No active lease on file. Billing and maintenance requests need an active lease.
MyPortal.summaryRentLink: Browse available units to lease online
MyPortal.forbiddenHint: This area is for residents. If you are staff, open the admin console instead.
MyPortal.loadError: Could not load data. Check that you are signed in and the API is running.
MyPortal.maintenanceSubtitle: Submit requests for units on your active lease.
MyPortal.maintenanceNoUnit: You need an active lease with a unit before you can submit maintenance requests.

rentBook.title: Rent a unit
rentBook.subtitle: Vacant units with a listed rent can be booked instantly. Your lease becomes active as soon as you confirm.
rentBook.empty: No units are available for self-service right now. Ask the office when new units open up.
rentBook.loadError: Could not load available units. Check that you are signed in and the API is running.
rentBook.loadError404Hint: If you recently updated the app, rebuild and restart the Go API so it serves GET /v1/me/available-units (for example: docker compose up -d --build api).
rentBook.loadError403Hint: You may be signed in as an account without resident access, or your session is missing a linked resident profile.
rentBook.endHint: Leave blank for an open-ended lease. If set, end must be after start.
